name: Auto Research rebrand and cross-platform rewrite
acceptance_tests: Public docs and metadata use the Auto Research brand while keeping functional repository links and install commands
Codex plugin package installs from the repo marketplace and mirrors the root skill bundle
Distribution validation and compatibility log tests pass
notes: Implementation is complete locally. Keep current web URLs live for the first rewrite. Maintain legacy autoresearch identifiers where compatibility matters. GitHub rename target is Maleick/AutoResearch, but the slug is currently blocked by the existing Maleick/autoresearch repo.
